action.reasoning: Observation: Latest test AUC 0.7581 (val peak 0.7585@ep13), overall best still 0.7583 from iter17 (e=256/h=768). train.py truncated in workspace (incomplete save dict at 'hidden_'), but CKPT saved OK and predict validated. Curves show fast early drop then plateau/overfit. Analysis: Embedded LSTM-DKT strong (interaction embeds + per-skill output + masking + ES/clip/scheduler); higher embed/layers can capture better long-term deps for higher val peak and close gen gap. ~10min left (~6 iters at ~80s). Decision: Fully rewrite all 3 files clean/complete (no truncation, full hparam ckpt, no verbose in scheduler, robust ES/clip/jsonl-only-logging + local /tmp predict validation using val.pt, arg parsing, exact inference match); tune to e=448/h=896/l=3/d=0.5/lr=1e-4/wd=1e-4/bs=32/epochs=60/es_pat=15/sch_pat=5 for richer reps + capacity. Run train then submit_eval on best_model.pt.
